_comment: Per-fixture worst-page tolerances for the generated IDML/PDF corpus.
Each fixture's renderer-vs-pdftoppm output is gated on these numbers in
CI (.github/workflows/fidelity.yml -> corpus/generated/diff.sh).
Semantics: a fixture passes iff *every* page that has a matching
reference PDF page (cand-NNN.png + ref-NNN.png) satisfies
mean_de <= max_mean_de AND p99_de <= max_p99_de AND ssim >= min_ssim.
Pages without a matching reference are skipped (max_pages_with_pdf bounds
this — IDMLs that grew past their last InDesign-export are still allowed
to run; only the first N pages are gated).
Calibration: thresholds were originally sized to the worst observed page
+ ~15-25% headroom so noise does not flap. They are periodically
*tightened* (never loosened to mask a regression) so a fixture running
well below its budget actually catches future regressions.
Tightening rule of thumb:
worst_current / threshold ratio  →  action
> 75%                          →  leave alone (close to the edge)
50–75%                         →  drop to worst * 1.15 (15% headroom)
≤ 50%                          →  drop to worst * 1.20 (20% headroom)
SSIM is raised toward (worst_min - ~0.005) once there is ≥0.010 headroom.
Long-term goal stays the idea.md §13.2 budget:
mean ΔE <= 1.0, p99 ΔE <= 2.5, SSIM >= 0.99 (every page).
Tightening below those targets needs a (now generously achieved) measurement
to justify it; loosening any threshold needs a written rationale in the
commit message.

fixtures.name: geometry
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.108 / p99 0.000 / SSIM 0.994. Mean tightened 0.15→0.13 (1.20× headroom over current). p99 stays at the 0.5 noise floor (measured 0 — pages are mostly white). SSIM stays at the long-term 0.99 target.

fixtures.name: geometry-groups
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.160 / p99 0.000 / SSIM 0.989 (p5). Substantially tightened from the original (1.2 / 50.0 / 0.97) — the nested-group p6 outlier the old budget was sized for is gone. Re-loosen p99 if overprint simulation (Tier 3 #14) reintroduces nested-group spikes.

fixtures.name: strokes-fills
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.440 (p12), p99 9.381 (p18), SSIM 0.987 (p13). All three measurements are ≥75% of threshold so we leave the budget alone — stroke-gradient endpoint paths sit close to the edge already.

fixtures.name: text
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.527 (p6), p99 7.396 (p6), SSIM 0.973. Mean and SSIM are close to budget (keep). p99 dropped 10.5→8.6 (1.15× over 7.396). Body-text drift remains the touchy path; this catches a per-line shift >~1px while keeping noise headroom.

fixtures.name: text-advanced
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.562 / p99 15.963 / SSIM 0.968 (p1, drop-cap + tabs). All three measurements are ≥80% of threshold so the budget stays — drop-cap glyph-clip and tab decimal alignment dominate p99 here.

fixtures.name: effects
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.334 / p99 5.349 / SSIM 0.993 (p12, feathers). All three at >80% of budget — keep. Feather + drop-shadow pages dominate; SSIM stays high because pixels are spread across a smooth gradient.

fixtures.name: gradients
fixtures.rationale: worst meanΔE 0.158 / p99 1.027 / SSIM 0.994. All three are ≥79% of budget — kept. Tightest of the corpus; locks in CMYK gradient tessellation fidelity (commit 86b5bdf).

fixtures.name: tables
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.886 / p99 10.827 / SSIM 0.967 (p3). All three are ≥80% of budget — kept. Tables are the loosest fixture; IDML ships 8 pages but the reference PDF has 7, so we cap at 7 and skip the trailing page.

fixtures.name: images
fixtures.rationale: IDML ships 14 pages but reference PDF only covers the first 5. The 5 gated pages have meanΔE ≤ 0.105 / p99 0 / SSIM ≥ 0.995. Mean tightened 0.15→0.13 (1.20× over current worst); p99 keeps the noise floor; SSIM stays at long-term 0.99.
